Easy Installment:
1. Peel off the yellow seal tape carefully.
2. Please do not remove the plastic rubber seal.
3. Insert into corresponding slot until it clicks into place.

Warm Tips:
1) Avoid storing in high temperature, and direct sunlight.
2) When the printer records the same memory serial number, usually there are two Error message: “Replace cartridge” and “Ink cartridges cannot be recognized” : Take out cartridge, Clean the chip then reinstall the cartridge untill it is recognized. If other error messages appear, like “Low Ink” “Cartridge Problem” “Missing or damaged”, try the same solution, or restart the printer.
3) Do not update the firmware of your XP series printers, not matter it is Automatic or Manual. Otherwise All the compatible inks (NON-OEM) will not work for the memory serial number of chip.
4) Due to uncontrollable factors in the transportation, if you find the cartridge is leaking or other issues, please log in your your Account > Click Your Account > Your Orders > Find your order and Click Contact Seller to contact us. All emails will be responded within 12 h

title: ArtiTech Compatible Ink Cartridge Replacement for Brother LC3011 LC-3011 BK Black Ink Work for Brother MFC-J491DW MFC-J497DW MFC-J690DW MFC-J895DW Printers, 4 Pack LC3011 BK Compatible Ink Cartridges
subtitle: ArtiTech Compatible Ink Cartridge Replacement
overview:
Item: Compatible Ink Cartridges Replacement for Brother LC3011 Black ( NON-OEM )
 
Packaging included: 4 x LC3011 Black ink cartridges


Every cartridge was protected in an individual sealed plastic bag. Multiple protections ensure the safety of transportation.
 
Compatible Printers:


Compatible For Brother MFC-J491DW Printer


Compatible For Brother MFC-J497DW Printer


Compatible For Brother MFC-J690DW Printer


Compatible For Brother MFC-J895DW Printer
 
How to install the ink cartridge?
 
1. Remove the ink cartridge from the individual package.
 
2. Remove the yellow pull tab, recommends using a paper towel. No need to peel off the plastic covering the nozzle, it will be punctured by the printer automatically once installed
 
3. Insert the cartridge into the designated color slot, Making Sure it is completed clicked in. You may need to PUSH a little bit hard for the LC3011 series.
 
4. Click OK or Start if the printer shows a message such as “NO INK” or “Non-Original”, this is normal for compatible cartridges. If the cartridge does not show ink level on the printer monitor, please reinstall the cartridge
 
It may take a few attempts, cartridge performance will not be unaffected even without showing an ink level.
 
5. If the original packages you have got have been damaged, please do not use them, instead of contacting our AMZ service team for replacement. Because the cartridges might be damaged during transportation.
Package include: 4 x LC3011 black compatible ink cartr
